companies.name: Llamaverse Finance Authority
companies.description: The Llamaverse Finance Authority is the central body responsible for public financial records, tax administration, and regulatory oversight of the llamaverse financial sector. It made headlines in February 2025 after a misconfigured document permissions issue exposed 1.2 million citizen records. Following the incident, the authority became a vocal advocate for permission-query based validation in document ingest pipelines.
companies.marklogicUse: Central financial records store; now implements permission-query validation gates
